[Provide the detailed description for the class
, including the inputs, outputs & internal method processing
Send redirect to correct url when user login.
This function has 2 parameter requests, responses. When the user clicks the register button. This function will be triggered through method POST from the html.
If the register is successful, it will send back to the login page so the user can login with the registered email and the generated password sent via email.
If the register is failed due to duplicate email, it will send back to the register page with the error message to notify the user
This function takes 2 parameters: request and response.
This method will call the method “
(email)” from the UserDAO. This method will return either User or null
If the User is null, this method calls the method “
(username)” to automatically generate the username. If the username
within the database, it will be called
)” to automatically generate a random password which is more than 6 characters.

name, username, password, email, active, creditPoint)” from class CustomerDAO will be called
insert a customer to the database

(password)” from the class EmailSender to automatically create an html and pass the generated password to that email
specify which email is sent to
If the Email html has been generated successfully, this method
send the email to the registered email
Finally, return the boolean to notify that registering procedure is successful, or failed.
